Off Calendar Aug-13-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Marilou Reyes Bustonera, Esq. of Van De Poel, Levy & Allen LLP, Tel. 925.934.6102, for Cross Defendant and moving party.

No other appearance. The court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS DEFENDANT PRECISION MASONRY's Motion For Leave To File Cross Complaint and Request For Judicial Notice is Granted. There is no prejudice to any party in granting the motion and requiring the moving party to pursue its claims in a separate action would be a waste of judicial resources. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
